message:
🌱 Add langflow: Ollama component model listing fix mission (#860)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "langflow-2885-ollama-component-cannot-get-models-from-ollama-server",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "langflow: Ollama component cannot get models from Ollama server",
+    "description": "Ollama component cannot get models from Ollama server. This issue affects 7+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify langflow troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your langflow installation:\n```bash\npip show langflow | grep Version\n```\nLook for the Ollama component failing to list available models from the Ollama server."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review the issue",
+        "description": "The Ollama component in Langflow does not pick up the models from the Ollama server. This was caused by a regression introduced in a recent code change that broke the model listing functionality."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Ollama component model listing",
+        "description": "The fix corrects the model listing logic in the Ollama component. After applying the fix, the component should return the available models:\n```json\n[\n    \"model1\",\n    \"model2\",\n    \"model3\"\n]\n```\nUpgrade langflow to the version that includes this bug fix:\n```bash\npip install --upgrade langflow\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm the issue is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the Ollama component in Langflow can now successfully list and connect to models from your Ollama server."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Fixed a regression in the Ollama component's model listing logic that prevented it from discovering available models on the Ollama server.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "langflow",
+      "community",
+      "ai-app",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "langflow"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/langflow-ai/langflow/issues/2885",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/langflow-ai/langflow",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/langflow-ai/langflow/pull/2935"
+    },
+    "reactions": 7,
+    "comments": 46,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "pip",
+      "python"
+    ],
+    "description": "Python 3.10+ with langflow installed (pip install langflow). A running Ollama server with at least one model pulled."
+  },
+  "security": {
